title: NANA Announces 2018 Shareholder Dividend Distribution
summary: NANA’s board of directors declared a dividend for fiscal year 2018 on September 27, 2018. The NANA Regional Corporation, Inc. board of directors declared an FY18 dividend of $10.50 per share payable on or about November 20 2018, to shareholders of record as of November 2, 2018.
